mnemonics.title: Special PIDs: 0 and 1
mnemonics.content: **0** is for the **O**perating system (Kernel Scheduler). **1** is for the **I**nit (the first and most important user process). Think '**O**S **I**nit'.

mnemonics.title: System Call Names
mnemonics.content: **Get** the information you need: **P**ID -> get**p**id(), **P**arent **P**ID -> get**pp**id(), **P**rocess **G**roup ID -> get**pg**id(). The pattern is 'get' + the abbreviation.
